title: JÁRVÁNYVÉDELMI ELLENŐRZÉSEK (AZ ÉRINTETT FELEK ÁLTAL), FÓKUSZBAN AZ INTEGRÁLT VÁLLALATOK
description: A factsheet guiding the assessment and inspection of biosecurity measures in vertically integrated poultry production chains. It outlines the roles of corporate veterinarians and technicians, the use of company protocols and checklists, and advises farmers on transparency, honesty, and trust during site visits.
